end,438868-438868,function(C,r)local c=H(r)local o=function(o,O,g)return G(C,{o;O;g},r,c)end return o end,function(C,r)local c=H(r)local o=function(o)return G(C,{o},r,c)end return o end,function(C,r)local c=H(r)local o=function(o,O,g,F,E)return G(C,{o;O;g,F,E},r,c)end return o end,function(C)t[C]=t[C]-(-221416+221417)if t[C]==-634604+634604 then t[C],K[C]=nil,nil end end,function(C,r)local c=H(r)local o=function(o,O)return G(C,{o;O},r,c)end return o end return(f(15302667-(-867728),{}))(c(E))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[r(106178-69422)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
